loginSubtitle: Welcome back, continue your authentication flow.
registerSubtitle: Create your access in under 30 seconds.
otpRegister: Create my account with email code
sideDescription: Unified login and registration with password, email OTP and Google OIDC.

errorPage.title: Authentication interrupted
errorPage.subtitle: The authentication flow could not be completed. You can retry the sign-in or create a fresh account flow.
errorPage.genericReason: Kratos redirected to the error page, but no additional message was provided.
errorPage.unavailableReason: The detailed Kratos error is no longer available. Start a fresh sign-in flow and try again.

messages.logoutSuccess: Logout successful, the session cookie has been cleared.
messages.passwordFallback: Failed to complete the password authentication flow.
messages.consentRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to create an account.
messages.otpStartFallback: Failed to start the OTP flow.
messages.otpVerifyFallback: Failed to verify the OTP code.
messages.googleFallback: Failed to start the Google flow.
